price and time frame

--- Darren dkiesq@aol.com wrote:

FYI

-----Original Message-----
From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
Date: Sat, 4 Mar 2006 13:22:21
To:DKIESQ@aol.com
Subject: FW: Tender

FYI –

Darren,

 

Steve Marshal is a Marine Surveyor that I know.  He
works for the largest and most respected company,
Patton Marine.  His wife, Julie, is a Nautica
Representative.  Franco owns Nautica.

The information should be accurate.

 

 

Regards,

 

Craig Tafoya

 

Penumbra Marine Logistics

(954) 791-9992 Office

(954) 328-6203 Mobile

From: steve [mailto:mem1517@attglobal.net]
Sent: Saturday, March 04, 2006 9:36 AM
To: Craig TAFOYA
Subject: Tender

 

Hi Craig

I spoke with Franco yesterday regarding the 41ft.
They have had 65MPH on the open 41ft with 3 x 225hp
Yamaha's. He would put on the 41 cabin 3 x 275hp
Verado Mercury engines. He said they are a great
engine however they will require premium quality
fuel. If the boat is going to be used in the Bahamas
then he recommends the 300hp 2 stroke engine. There
is also a Yamaha service agent in the Bahamas.

Speed for the cabin is expected between 55-60MPH. It
is all made from Kevlar. He also recommends your
client sea trail the Sheriffs tender so he can have
a close look at it even though it is slower. The
sheriffs tender weighs 24,000 lb. A 41ft cabin with
outboards is expected to weigh in at approx
16,000lb. Any further question give us a call.

Best regards,

 

Steve Marshall
T:  954 927 2058
F:  954 927 2059
